[188:34]That's how you achieve that.

[204:44]This is just like the scandal that will not die. This is now week number three we're entering.

[204:52]It's been two full weeks since the Department of Justice promulgated their memo covering

[204:58]up the Epstein scandal. And if you recall, this is how it all started. The Trump administration

[205:08]They even go through the motions and they invite all the pro-Trump influencers to the

[205:12]White House.

[205:13]They give them these prop binders that say Epstein files, they do a big photo shoot.

[205:20]And ostensibly they were committed to transparency on this issue.

[205:23]It's a very important issue.

[205:25]If the goal of the Trump movement is to drain the swamp, if it is an anti-corruption movement

[205:36]And away from an elite cabal, which is controlled by money,

[205:40]by blackmail, by other mechanisms,

[205:44]then arguably this is necessary.

[205:46]This is fundamental.

[205:48]This is not one issue among others,

[205:50]which I've seen people say.

[205:53]A lot of people have said,

[205:54]what difference will the Epstein files make in your life?

[205:59]They say, who cares?

[206:01]We can do nothing about it.

[206:03]And even if we knew what is contained in the files, they said, what does that do for Americans?

[206:10]I'm more interested in immigration.

[206:12]I'm more interested in tax cuts or some other such thing.

[206:16]And I would say, well, this is not one issue among other issues.

[206:20]It's not, they're not compartmentalized.

[206:23]It's not a minor issue.

[206:25]It's not one issue in a category of other issues.

[206:28]This is essential, because like I said, if you believe that the Trump movement is fundamentally

[206:33]an anti-corruption movement, which says, this is important, if the Trump movement says that

[206:42]that our government has been failing us for 30 years

[206:46]on every issue, on healthcare, on immigration,

[206:49]on foreign policy, on trade,

[206:51]if our government has been failing us,

[206:55]and it has been failing us because it has been prioritizing

[206:59]other interests of corporations, of foreign governments,

[207:03]of themselves, the elite class.

[207:13]because our government is not motivated by elections

[207:17]and by public service,

[207:20]but is instead motivated by fear, fear of blackmail,

[207:24]controlled by money, controlled by other forms of control,

[207:28]then you know that it is necessary

[207:32]for the government to work for the people

[207:34]to change how government works.

[207:42]the people, because of blackmail, because of intelligence agencies, because of oligarchical

[329:40]Monday through Friday, remember to smash the follow button.
